user.title: Add Meter
user.description: Configure a gas or water meter for manual reading entry.

data_description.meter_type: Select whether this is a gas or water meter.
data_description.meter_name: A descriptive name for this meter (e.g. Kitchen, Garden).
data_description.meter_number: The serial number printed on your physical meter.

error.empty_meter_number: Meter number must not be empty.
error.empty_meter_name: Meter name must not be empty.

data_description.meter_number: Update the meter serial number (e.g. after meter replacement).

record_reading.name: Record reading
record_reading.description: Record a new meter reading, optionally with a photo for OCR.

config_entry_id.name: Meter
config_entry_id.description: The meter to record the reading for.

meter_reading.name: Meter reading
meter_reading.description: The current meter reading in m³. Optional if an image is provided for OCR.

meter_number.name: Meter number
meter_number.description: Override the configured meter number for this reading.

timestamp.name: Timestamp
timestamp.description: Date and time of the reading. If omitted and an image is provided, the EXIF capture date from the photo is used. Otherwise defaults to now.

image.name: Image
image.description: File path to a photo of the meter for OCR extraction.

set_price.name: Set price
set_price.description: Set a new consumption price per m³. Historical prices are preserved.

config_entry_id.name: Meter
config_entry_id.description: The meter to set the price for.

valid_from.name: Valid from
valid_from.description: Date from which this price is effective. Defaults to today.

read_meter_image.name: Read meter image
read_meter_image.description: Extract meter reading and number from a photo using OCR without recording.

image.name: Image
image.description: File path to the meter photo.

image_not_found.message: Image file not found at the specified path.

ocr_unavailable.message: Tesseract OCR is not available. Please install tesseract-ocr on your system.

ocr_failed.message: Could not extract a meter reading from the image. Please provide the reading manually.

reading_required.message: A meter reading value is required.

reading_decreased.message: The new reading must be greater than or equal to the last reading.
